dataQuery.sqlStatement: SELECT SYSDATE, hou.name operating_unit, aps.segment1 supplier_number, aps.vendor_name supplier_name, ass.vendor_site_code supplier_site, aia.creation_date invoice_date, aia.invoice_id invoice_number, aia.description description, ail.line_number line_number, ail.line_type_lookup_code line_type, aia.invoice_amount amount FROM ap_invoices_all aia, ap_invoice_lines_all ail, ap_supplier_sites_all ass, hr_operating_units hou, ap_suppliers aps WHERE ass.vendor_site_id = aia.vendor_site_id AND aia.invoice_id = ail.invoice_id AND ass.vendor_id = aia.vendor_id AND aia.org_id = hou.organization_id AND aia.vendor_id = aps.vendor_id AND ail.line_number = :line_number AND aia.invoice_id = :invoice_id
